trigger: A background agent has been spawned for TASK-XX and loop-backlog is waiting for completion
prompt_template:
You are the loop-backlog orchestrator. A background agent for {task_id} has been running.
The task branch is task/{task_id}.
Execute these steps in order using Bash:
1. Check the signal file: test -f backlog/.agent-done-{task_id} && echo "agent-done-{task_id} found" || echo "waiting"
2. Proceed to merge: git merge --no-ff task/{task_id}
3. Set Done: backlog task edit {task_id} --status "Done"
Run all three Bash commands now, in order.

context.description: loop-backlog must wait for the .agent-done-TASK-XX signal file to appear before proceeding to merge. It must not call git merge before the signal file is confirmed present.

required_sequence.description: Check signal file existence before merge
Merge only after signal file confirmed
